node.text: Voice before appearance. Compatibility before matches.
Voice before appearance. Connection before contact details.
Photos and full profiles unlock only after both members exchange at least 10 messages and one voice note. Real conversation comes before full visibility — and contact sharing comes later still.
Archetype, voice prompt, emotional rhythm. Photos remain veiled.
Mutual conversation softens the veil. Deeper insights unlock.
Sustained interest opens full profile and intentional meetup tools.
Compatibility-first dating. Meaningful connections form before appearance becomes central.
